channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Opinions on Daylight Saving Time and Public Preferences for Light
item.description: The Globe and Mail's letters to the editor for March 8 include diverse perspectives on current Canadian issues, with a notable focus on daylight saving time. Readers expressed strong opinions on the n...

item.title: Discovery of an Isospin-Symmetric Island of Inversion in Molybdenum-84
item.description: Physicists have identified a surprising new 'Island of Inversion' in molybdenum-84, challenging long-held assumptions in nuclear physics. Traditionally, these regions, where atomic nuclei adopt highly...

item.title: Mumbai Hospital Receives Email Bomb Threat; Police Conduct Investigation
item.description: A hospital in Mumbai faced a bomb threat through an email received late last night around 11:00 PM. The message claimed that an 'LED blast' would occur at the hospital premises at 4:00 PM today. This ...

item.title: Sen. Katie Britt Discusses Trump, Foreign Conflicts, and Gridlock in Washington
item.description: This video segment features Senator Katie Britt discussing how President Donald Trump’s agenda intersects with ongoing international conflicts and the persistent gridlock in Washington, D.C. She refle...

item.title: Black Market Dollar to Naira Exchange Rate Stands at ₦1420 Sell / ₦1400 Buy on March 7, 2026
item.description: As of March 8th, 2026, the latest update on the dollar to naira exchange rate focuses mainly on the parallel market, popularly called black market or Aboki fx. According to sources from Bureau De Chan...

item.title: FDC Building plans IPO with potential market value over $1 billion
item.description: FDC Construction & Fitout (FDC), a major Australian construction and fit-out company led by Ben Cottle, is moving towards an initial public offering (IPO) amid strong revenue performance. With around ...

item.title: Trump Faces Diplomatic Strain as UK Maintains Distance Over Iran Conflict
item.description: During a visit to Dover Air Base for the dignified transfer of six fallen U.S. soldiers, President Donald Trump appeared visibly affected, yet his attention quickly shifted to diplomatic concerns with...

item.title: Tanzanian Ambassador Stephen Mbundi Appointed as EAC Secretary General
item.description: At the 25th Ordinary Summit of East African Community (EAC) Heads of State held in Arusha, Tanzanian national Ambassador Stephen Mbundi was officially appointed as the new Secretary General of the reg...

item.title: Overcoming pessimism and victim mentality in friendships through self-reflection and compassion
item.description: A 38-year-old woman with a husband and three children describes her persistent pattern of expecting disappointment from friends. She anticipates cancellations, downplays invitations by saying events a...

item.title: Samidoh Remembers His Foster Dad on First Anniversary of Passing
item.description: Kenyan singer Samidoh recently took to Instagram to mark the first death anniversary of his foster dad, former presidential pilot James Gitahi. Gitahi, who had flown Presidents Daniel Moi and Mwai Kib...

item.title: Erdogan Warns Starmer That Prolonged US-Israeli Attacks on Iran Risk Regional and Global Instability
item.description: Turkish President Recep Tayyip Erdogan hold phone call with UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer on Saturday, where him express serious worry about the ongoing escalation wey start with US and Israeli attac...

item.title: Blair comments on US-Iran strikes as UK reacts to Ian Huntley's death and royal charity news
item.description: The Sunday Telegraph reports that former Prime Minister Sir Tony Blair has criticised Labour leader Sir Keir Starmer for not supporting American strikes on Iran, emphasising the importance of the UK-U...

item.title: Kemi Badenoch faces calls to apologise after suggesting RAF jets are 'just hanging around' in the Middle East
item.description: The leader of the Conservative Party, Kemi Badenoch, has come under fire from the government after comments she made regarding British military operations in the Middle East amid escalating tensions w...

item.title: APC Condemns Alleged Involvement of State Publicity Secretary in Kidnap and Murder of Traditional Ruler in Ebonyi
item.description: The All Progressives Congress (APC) for Ebonyi State don express big shock over one of their member wey allegedly involve for the kidnap and killing of HRH Francis Igwe, the traditional ruler of Ndufu...

item.title: Embracing Gender-Neutral Parenting in an All-Girls Family
item.description: This article shares the story of a Kenyan family raising three girls without a brother, showcasing how gender-neutral parenting breaks traditional stereotypes. The mum explains that she and her husban...

item.title: Mamata Banerjee Raises Concerns Over President Murmu and BJP Amid Controversy
item.description: The ongoing political debate in India has intensified as West Bengal Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee has openly criticised the ruling BJP and the President, Droupadi Murmu. Banerjee claims that the BJP...

item.title: Official Iftar and Sehri Timings for Federal and Provincial Capitals on Ramazan 18 and 19
item.description: Dawn provides updated Sehri and Iftar timings for Ramazan 18 and 19 for all major federal and provincial capitals of Pakistan. For Islamabad, the Hanafia school of thought observes Iftar at 6:11pm tod...

item.title: Court Orders Review After Alleged IVF Embryo Mix-Up in Durban
item.description: A complex legal battle has unfolded in Durban over an alleged IVF mix-up that may have resulted in a child being born from the wrong embryo. A black couple from Ballito claims that one of their embryo...

item.title: Gabriel Diallo beats Andrey Rublev and advances to third round at Indian Wells
item.description: Montreal’s Gabriel Diallo achieved a notable victory at the Indian Wells Open, defeating 17th-seeded Russian Andrey Rublev in a tightly contested second-round match. Diallo lost the first set 6-7 (4) ...

item.title: Australia secures 10-wicket Test win over India as Alyssa Healy retires
item.description: Australia comfortably secured a 10-wicket victory against India in the day-night Test at the WACA Ground, marking a notable end to Alyssa Healy's illustrious Test career, although she did not bat in h...
